scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/worker && npm run build --workspace=apps/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared --if-present && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/server --if-present && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/worker --if-present && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/client --if-present
